blended.narrative: Lakeridge is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 58°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
